query:
INSERT INTO pricePackages (name, displayName, description, basePrice, cameraCount, cameraType, microphoneCount, microphoneType, operatorCount, targetAudience, `order`, isActive, status) VALUES
('simple', '1. Simple (심플)', '편집비 포함', 800000, '5~6', '4K Camera', '2', 'Stereo Recording Mic', '1~2', '독주회, 소규모 실내악', 1, 1, 'published'),
('economy', '2. Economy (이코노미)', '편집비 포함', 1500000, '8~10', '4K Camera', '2', 'Stereo Recording Mic', '2~3', '중규모 공연, 실내악 앙상블', 2, 1, 'published'),
('professional', '3. Professional (프로페셔널)', '편집비 포함', 3200000, '9~12', '4K-6K Cinema Camera', '2~4', 'Professional Recording Mic', '4~6', '대규모 공연, 오케스트라, 특별 프로젝트', 3, 1, 'published');
